message:
Fix ShellCheck warnings and improve test reliability

- Remove unused SYNC_STATE_FILE variable
- Add shellcheck disable directive for git @{u} syntax (false positive)
- Add shellcheck directives for nameref variables in cmd_remove
- Fix test script to use git -C instead of cd (follows project discipline)
- Add missing json_escape source in test_local_git.sh
- Add shellcheck directives for intentional patterns in tests

All ShellCheck warnings at severity=warning now pass.
All 25 tests (8 parsing + 17 git operations) pass.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1947,9 +1947,11 @@ cmd_remove() {
             fi
 
             # Parse the line to extract URL and compare owner/repo
+            # shellcheck disable=SC2034  # line_branch and line_custom_name are set by nameref but unused here
             local line_url line_branch line_custom_name
             parse_repo_spec "$line" line_url line_branch line_custom_name
 
+            # shellcheck disable=SC2034  # line_host is set by nameref but unused here
             local line_host line_owner line_repo
             local should_remove="false"
             if parse_repo_url "$line_url" line_host line_owner line_repo; then

@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@
 #
 # shellcheck disable=SC2034  # Variables are used by sourced functions from ru
 # shellcheck disable=SC1090  # Dynamic sourcing is intentional
+# shellcheck disable=SC2155  # Declare and assign separately - acceptable in tests
 set -uo pipefail
 
 SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
